description_long: This is a round, backless stool featuring a plush, tufted red leather cushion as its seat, adorned with a ring of metallic studs around its edge for added visual interest. The seat rests atop a dark wooden frame, which is circular at the base and features intersecting supports for stability. The wood has a rich, deep finish, giving the stool a classic and slightly rustic appearance. The metallic studs provide a decorative accent, contrasting with the soft, textured leather and the smooth, polished wood. The stool is compact and sturdy, suitable for use in urban environments such as bars, cafes, or public waiting areas. Its design is both functional and decorative, blending comfort with a touch of vintage flair.
description: A round, tufted red leather stool with metallic studs and a dark wooden circular base, combining comfort and classic decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plush red leather seat, metallic studs, and the intersecting wooden supports of the base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the seat and the symmetry of the wooden base.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the cushion and the continuous ring of metallic studs.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the full circular base and the even distribution of the decorative studs.
